criteria.justification: R1 is explicitly marked FAIL and cites `security.instructions.md` rule R1, naming `User.phoneNumber` / `PATCH /api/users/:id/phone` and requiring named human PR sign-off before merge.
The Reviewer scope note says the review is advisory context for the human reviewer and CI and does not merge or approve the PR.
The Governance rule verdicts section gives an explicit verdict for every rule R1 through R6 rather than a single overall judgment.
R4 is explicitly marked FAIL as a blocking issue and names the missing required artifact as a migration under `migrations/`, while rejecting "no longer used" as sufficient rationale.
The Reviewer scope note says the review is advisory context for the human reviewer and CI and does not merge or approve the PR.
The Governance rule verdicts section gives an explicit verdict for every rule R1 through R6 rather than a single overall judgment.
